classification_rationale: This release promotes ProductOS to V8.1.0 after the mission-first control-plane hardening and simplified start/import CLI passed Ralph-loop inspection, validation, fix, and revalidation.
summary: ProductOS V8.1.0 is the stable release for mission-first control-plane hardening and simplified start/import CLI.
upgrade_actions: Adopt the promoted Mission-first control-plane hardening and simplified start/import CLI in the current ProductOS operating flow.
Use the automatic Ralph-gated release promotion command for future successful slices.
Keep private self-hosting work outside PM product workspaces and promote only reusable repo surfaces.
